economic_notes: Nation operates Petro Gas Bar, Club SAPP, The Loonie Bin Gaming Lounge, Sapotaweyak Internet Services. Equity investments in Aseneskak Casino Limited Partnership and Mahihkan Bus Lines LP. VLT commitments of $168,532 annually. Economic development start-up loans to members.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2022 (not 2024). Province is Manitoba. 10 fully consolidated subsidiaries including gaming, housing, health, education, internet services, gas bar. 2 GBEs accounted for by modified equity method (Aseneskak Casino LP and Mahihkan Bus Lines LP). Construction in progress of $7,112,995 is separate from TCA net book value. Net debt position of $8,367,820. Contingent liability of $298,853 related to ISC social services funding recoveries. Large increase in long-term debt from $8.3M to $11.6M due to new Governance Building loan. Significant capital asset additions of $17.6M during year. Unexpended funding decreased from $8.78M to $5.02M.
